arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Bayern Munich director comments on Mathys Tel speculation
arts.sum: Bayern Munich director Christoph Freund comments on speculation that is linking Mathys Tel with a transfer to Chelsea.

Chelsea ended a four-game winless run with a resounding 5-0 FA Cup win over Morecambe on Saturday afternoon. Bournemouth also booked their place in the next round of the FA Cup on Saturday as they sm...

arts.ttl: Chelsea misfit Christopher Nkunku 'agrees' transfer exit as Blues eye swap deal
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku has been linked with a transfer away from Chelsea after failing to break into Enzo Maresca's Premier League starting lineup - and he has drawn interest from Bayern Munich

arts.ttl: €60m Chelsea star agrees terms with European giants
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku has already agreed terms with Bayern Munich after Monday's blockbuster news of a potential'swap' deal. On Monday, seemingly everything changed when it was revealed that Chelsea had opened talks with Bayern Munich over young forward Mathys Tel and that the name of Nkunku had been mentioned in these discussions.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea beat eight clubs to complete popular signing last summer, Enzo Maresca's arrival played a big part
arts.sum: The Blues will be glad they did.

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Bayern in talks over sensational double transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea and Bayern Munich are reportedly engaged in “ongoing” talks over the possibility of Christopher Nkunku and Mathys Tel swapping clubs in the January transfer window. The Blues attacker has featured 28 times this season, but has only started three games in the Premier League under Enzo Maresca, something he is said to be unhappy […] The post Chelsea and Bayern in talks over sensational double transfer first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea suffer Mathys Tel blow as Bayern Munich sporting director sends 'clear' message
arts.sum: Chelsea have enquired over the availability of the 19-year-old

arts.ttl: 10 VAR errors this season revealed including Bruno Fernandes and Liverpool controversies
arts.sum: VAR has made a total of 10 errors so far this season, according to the Premier League's Key Match Incidents panel - and Mirror Football has taken a look at all the incidents

arts.ttl: What happened yesterday between Axel Disasi and Enzo Maresca as defender is now set to leave Chelsea – Romano
arts.sum: With Chelsea already set to lose a first team defender in this transfer window, they could be about to add another name to that list....

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Axel Disasi 'to be left out' of squad for Bournemouth Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca will reportedly leave one of his central defenders out of the squad for Tuesday's game with Bournemouth ahead of a potential exit.
